fsamsterdam Ready to put your data skills to the test? 

Join the Data Science Competition and tackle real-life business cases from leading companies like EY, Van Lanschot Kempen, Coolblue, Metyis, and Google.

Over three days, you’ll work on challenging problems, connect with top firms, and prove your analytical edge. The competition is open to all students interested in Data Science and will be held in English. 

Dates: June 8th – 10th
Application deadline: May 24th, 23:59

Think you can outsmart the competition? Apply now via the link in bio.

macroglide 🗞️ Stop Guessing Market Moves.
Join FREE Newsletter (LINK IN BIO).

The most useful financial models you can realistically build at home are the core ones used on Wall Street: a discounted cash flow model to value companies based on future cash flows, a three-statement model linking income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow for forecasting, a comparable companies model using valuation multiples, a simple leveraged buyout model to understand private equity returns, and a portfolio tracking or backtesting model to analyze investment performance; these models teach valuation, forecasting, capital structure, and risk, and together form the foundation of most real-world finance work.

Credits: Pinterest, 2026
Edited for educational purposes. No
ownership claimed. This content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice.

mancho.school 5,700 стартапов из Y Combinator провалились.

Их собрали все в одном месте — с разбором ошибок и планами перезапуска.

Slack начинался как игровая компания. Instagram — приложение для чекинов. Twitter — подкаст-платформа.

Идеи выжили. Команды — нет.

Главный урок из 5,700 провалов один: идея ничего не стоит без человека, который умеет её построить.

Не описать. Не презентовать. Именно построить — код, архитектуру, систему, которая работает под нагрузкой.

Этому учат в Mancho School. Software engineering с нуля — для тех, кто хочет оказаться по другую сторону этого списка.

Напишите слово "идея" в комментариях — пришлём ссылку на сайт.

analytics_vidhya 📊 Just created a complete, end-to-end Pandas handbook

Pandas is where raw data turns into something usable.

Before models, dashboards, or predictions, there is always a messy CSV, an Excel file, or a database table. Pandas is the tool that makes sense of all of it.

I put together a full Pandas guide that covers:
• Loading data from files, Excel, and SQL
• Cleaning missing and messy values
• Filtering, grouping, and aggregations
• Merging, joining, and reshaping data
• Time series and real-world pipelines

This is not just syntax. It’s how Pandas is actually used in analytics, data science, and machine learning workflows.

If you can think clearly in Pandas, you can move from raw data to insights without friction.

Curious to know how Pandas fits into your day-to-day work 👇

stics.ai 👉Follow us(@STICS.AI) for more such AI Tips 

Someone recently shared how they landed 6 interviews in just 7 days using prompts with Claude. Instead of sending the same generic resume everywhere, they used AI to tailor applications for every role. From rewriting resumes to crafting better cover letters, Claude helped make each application more relevant and focused.

The real advantage was how fast everything happened. Claude analyzed job descriptions, highlighted the most important skills, and suggested edits that matched what recruiters were looking for. This made every application feel personalized without spending hours rewriting everything manually.

It shows how AI is quietly changing the job search process. Tools like Claude are helping people prepare stronger resumes, practice interview questions, and understand exactly what companies expect. When used the right way, AI can turn a slow job hunt into a more strategic and efficient process.

Would you try using AI like Claude to improve your job applications and interviews? 

Follow for more AI insights and tools 🚀

 #stics

aiintelligencee Some of the smartest investors in the world just revealed where they believe the next AI gold rush is heading.

When firms like Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) and Y Combinator start openly sharing startup ideas, you should pay attention.

Because they don’t think about trends.
They think in decades.

For 2026, the focus isn’t just “another AI tool.”
It’s a vertical AI agent. AI-native workflows. Autonomous systems replacing entire job functions. Infrastructure for AI compliance, security, and data control. AI copilots for healthcare, law, finance, logistics, and manufacturing.

The opportunity is shifting from general chatbots to specialized, high-margin AI systems embedded inside real businesses.

This is where the next unicorns will be built.

The biggest AI companies of the next cycle won’t just use AI.
They’ll be AI-first from day one.

If you’re building, studying, or investing in AI — this is your signal.
The 2026 winners are starting now.

Follow @aiintelligencee for the biggest breakthroughs shaping the future of AI.

filatov.design 🚨Comment “Prompts” and I’ll send you the tool and the exact prompts I used 👹

Here’s Volume 2 of my highly realistic prompt collection ❄️

This one’s winter-themed — cinematic scenes, strong character consistency, and realistic lighting across different moods and environments.

Every image in this carousel was generated using Nano Banana Pro, and you can copy every single prompt with one click on my personal website (‼️free access for now 👀✨)

If you’re on Telegram, I highly recommend trying my Telegram bot. It’s honestly the most convenient and affordable way to generate images with Nano Banana Pro — perfect for 4K outputs and ultra-realistic results, without complicated setups.
